title: Podman Pull Images always error
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug
podman Pull Images always error 

/kind feature

**Description**
podman Pull Images always error 

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
An exception occurred when pulling the mirror. Procedure

```
$ podman --log-level=trace run redis
```
